input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.7.10.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.7.10.3
            TITLE: one shutdown button must be on each side of the vehicle which:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.7.10.3: One Shutdown Button must be on each side of the vehicle which:
EV.7.10.3 One Shutdown Button must be on each side of the vehicle which:  
a. Is located aft of the driver’s compartment at approximately the level of the driver’s head 
b. Has a diameter of 40 mm minimum  
c. Must not be easily removable or mounted onto removable body work

final_answer: One Shutdown Button must be on each side of the vehicle which: a. Is located aft of the driver’s compartment at approximately the level of the driver’s head b. Has a diameter of 40 mm minimum c. Must not be easily removable or mounted onto removable body work
